Piano & Vocal Lessons · Kuwait

Where Kuwait Learns to Play.

A boutique music academy founded by two performers — offering personalised piano and vocal lessons for every age, in a space designed for music.

EN · ARBilingual Teaching
Welcome to Aria

A conservatory feel, in the heart of Kuwait.

Aria Music Academy was created by two musicians who believe technique and artistry should be taught together. Whether you dream of playing your first piece on the piano or singing with confidence, every lesson is built around you — your goals, your pace, your voice.

Our studio is a calm, beautiful place to learn: practice rooms named after the great composers, a concert-quality grand piano, and an atmosphere that takes music seriously.

About the Academy

What We Teach

Lessons for every stage.

Start from scratch or refine a craft you already love. Each programme is private and fully tailored.

Piano Lessons
Beginner → Advanced
  • Classical foundations & technique
  • Read music and play by ear
  • Recital & exam preparation
  • Children and adults welcome
Learn more

Vocal & Singing
All levels
  • Healthy, sustainable vocal technique
  • Breath, pitch & stage confidence
  • Sing and accompany yourself on piano
  • Performance & audition coaching
Learn more

Music for Kids
Ages 5+
  • Playful, structured first lessons
  • Builds focus, memory & confidence
  • Friendly progress milestones
  • Parents kept in the loop
Learn more
Why Aria

Refined teaching, real results.

01

Taught by performers

Your teachers are an internationally-recognised concert pianist and an experienced vocal coach — not part-timers. You learn from people who perform.

02

Truly personalised

Every student gets an individual learning plan shaped to their age, level and ambition. No two lessons are copied from a template.

03

A space built for music

Acoustically considered practice rooms, a fine grand piano and a quiet, elegant setting that makes practice something to look forward to.

The Founders

Two artists, one academy.

Nilufar Jafarli

Co-Founder · Artistic Director

Concert pianist, Baku Music Academy (BMus & MMus), international prize-winner.

Chaimaa Chaarani

Co-Founder · Executive Director

Vocal coach & educator, American University of Beirut — 9+ years teaching all ages.

Meet the founders
Good to Know

Frequently asked questions

Do I need any experience to start?

Not at all. Most of our students begin as complete beginners — children and adults alike. We start exactly where you are.

How old does my child need to be?

We generally start children from around age five, when they can focus comfortably for a short lesson. We'll happily advise based on a quick chat.

Are lessons in Arabic or English?

Both. Our teaching is fully bilingual, so lessons run comfortably in Arabic or English depending on what suits the student.

Can I book a trial before committing?

Yes. A trial lesson is the best way to meet your teacher and see the studio. Get in touch and we'll arrange a time.

Book a Trial Lesson

Begin your music journey.

Book a trial lesson and discover what learning music at Aria feels like.
